description:
Overview:
Unique design, stylish and beautiful.
Good material, comfortable wear.
A variety of colors, any choice.


Product information:
Type: Ring
Treatment Process: Seiko
Color: black, silver, gold, blue, silver and black
Applicable people: Unisex
Size: no.6, no.7, no.8, no.9, no.10, no.11, no.12, no.13
Material: titanium steel


Packing list:
1* Ring
